root_text.sn48.51:1.2: ekaṁ samayaṁ bhagavā kosalesu viharati sālāya brāhmaṇagāme.
root_text.sn48.51:1.4: “seyyathāpi, bhikkhave, ye keci tiracchānagatā pāṇā, sīho migarājā tesaṁ aggamakkhāyati, yadidaṁ—thāmena javena sūrena;
root_text.sn48.51:1.5: evameva kho, bhikkhave, ye keci bodhipakkhiyā dhammā, paññindriyaṁ tesaṁ aggamakkhāyati, yadidaṁ—bodhāya.
root_text.sn48.51:2.2: Saddhindriyaṁ, bhikkhave, bodhipakkhiyo dhammo, taṁ bodhāya saṁvattati;
root_text.sn48.51:2.3: vīriyindriyaṁ bodhipakkhiyo dhammo, taṁ bodhāya saṁvattati;
root_text.sn48.51:2.4: satindriyaṁ bodhipakkhiyo dhammo, taṁ bodhāya saṁvattati;
root_text.sn48.51:2.5: samādhindriyaṁ bodhipakkhiyo dhammo, taṁ bodhāya saṁvattati;
root_text.sn48.51:2.6: paññindriyaṁ bodhipakkhiyo dhammo, taṁ bodhāya saṁvattati.
root_text.sn48.51:2.7: Seyyathāpi, bhikkhave, ye keci tiracchānagatā pāṇā, sīho migarājā tesaṁ aggamakkhāyati, yadidaṁ—thāmena javena sūrena;
root_text.sn48.51:2.8: evameva kho, bhikkhave, ye keci bodhipakkhiyā dhammā, paññindriyaṁ tesaṁ aggamakkhāyati, yadidaṁ—bodhāyā”ti.

translation_text.sn48.51:1.2: At one time the Buddha was staying in the land of the Kosalans near the brahmin village of Sālā.
translation_text.sn48.51:1.3: There the Buddha addressed the mendicants:
translation_text.sn48.51:1.4: “Mendicants, the lion, king of beasts, is said to be the best of animals in terms of strength, speed, and courage.
translation_text.sn48.51:1.5: In the same way, the faculty of wisdom is said to be the best of the qualities that lead to awakening in terms of becoming awakened.
translation_text.sn48.51:2.1: And what are the qualities that lead to awakening?
translation_text.sn48.51:2.6: and wisdom are qualities that lead to awakening, in that they lead to becoming awakened.
translation_text.sn48.51:2.7: The lion, king of beasts, is said to be the best of animals in terms of strength, speed, and courage.
translation_text.sn48.51:2.8: In the same way, the faculty of wisdom is said to be the best of the qualities that lead to awakening in terms of becoming awakened.”
